subcodes.first_line: O ye heavenly friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Were I to express my longing, no pages would suffice; were I to convey my yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی عبدالبهاء اگر بیان اشتیاق خواهم اوراق کفایت ننماید اگر آرزوی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
